glue.partition.schemaid.RegistryName.Description: The name of the schema registry that contains the schema.

glue.partition.schemaid.SchemaArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema. One of `SchemaArn` or `SchemaName` has to be provided.

glue.partition.schemaid.SchemaName.Description: The name of the schema. One of `SchemaArn` or `SchemaName` has to be provided.
